name: field
description: Wires a label, control, description and error into one accessible block — htmlFor/id, aria-describedby, aria-invalid and aria-required all handled, with the error announced as a polite alert.

notes: The label is tied to the control via htmlFor / id (clicking it focuses the control)
aria-describedby points at the description and the error message
aria-invalid is set while there's an error; aria-required when required
The error is a role=alert, announced when it appears
The required marker is decorative (aria-hidden) — state is conveyed via aria-required

intents: an accessible form field with a label, error and helper text
wire a label, description and error message to an input
label + input + error block with correct ARIA
